examples: Four laboratory confirmatory methods are commonly used.
The laboratory will conduct confirmatory tests and further characterize the virus.
Confirmatory tests will be performed at one of the WHO Collaborating Centres for Influenza.
Commenting on the study, Dr Mary Haines of Queen Mary, University of London, said further research was necessary to provide confirmatory evidence.
Our proposal is subject to the negotiation of a definitive merger agreement and our having the opportunity to conduct certain limited and confirmatory due diligence.
